hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.ghcup/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && (command -v ghcup > /dev/null 2>&1 || (curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://get-ghcup.haskell.org | BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_NONINTERACTIVE=1 BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_INSTALL_STACK=1 sh && echo 'GHCup and stack installed successfully')) && (command -v stack > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Haskell tools ready' || echo 'Warning: stack not found in PATH')
